summary: Complete frontend testing of Dashboard Virtual Legal Office redesign. All 22 features tested and verified working. The 3-column layout renders correctly with left sidebar (260px), main area, and right panel (240px). All interactive elements work as expected.

features_verified.1. Dashboard 3-column layout: PASS - Grid layout with 260px sidebar, flexible main, 240px right panel
features_verified.2. James card with stats: PASS - Shows 847K+ sources, 20 ans expérience, Live jurisprudence, #1 IA juridique
features_verified.3. Active cases list: PASS - 8 cases displayed with risk scores and colored dots
features_verified.4. Case selection: PASS - Clicking case in sidebar updates main area
features_verified.5. James banner badges: PASS - Shows 847K+ sources, Live, Action requise badges
features_verified.6. Case details: PASS - Shows title, date (Ouvert le...), document count
features_verified.7. Risk score 4 dimensions: PASS - Financier, Urgence, Juridique, Complexité all displayed
features_verified.8. AI findings with legal refs: PASS - Shows analysis with LIVE indicator and legal references
features_verified.9. Deadline card: PASS - Shows critical deadline with countdown (Expiré or X jours)
features_verified.11. Documents section: PASS - Shows document list in right panel
features_verified.12. Battle preview: PASS - Shows Vos arguments vs Leurs arguments (visible on cases with battle data)
features_verified.13. New case button: PASS - 'Ouvrir un nouveau dossier' button opens overlay
features_verified.14. Overlay 8 situations: PASS - All 8 French situation cards displayed
features_verified.15. Situation selection: PASS - Clicking card starts James conversational flow
features_verified.17. User responses: PASS - User can type and send responses via chat input
features_verified.21. Retour au dashboard: PASS - Closes overlay and returns to dashboard
features_verified.23. French characters: PASS - é, è, à, ç render correctly
features_verified.24. James question card: PASS - Shows on cases with ai_summary, has action buttons

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js is well-structured with clear separation of concerns
French localization is complete and renders correctly
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
The conversational flow is frontend-only (hardcoded questions) - works as designed
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Pro user with 8 cases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Virtual Legal Office redesign fully tested. Key features: (1) 3-column layout with James card, cases list, main view, right panel, (2) New case overlay with 8 French situations and conversational flow, (3) James question card appears on cases with ai_summary field, (4) Battle preview appears on cases with battle_preview data. Free user credentials (test@example.com) are invalid - may need to be re-seeded.

mocked_apis_list: New case conversational flow questions are hardcoded in frontend (not API-driven)
